agent_usage.orchestrator: Routed the task through canon, 10-episode chunk, draft, polish, and guard checks.
agent_usage.market_researcher: Framed the work as familiar Korean male fantasy with tower, survival, system, and community hooks.
agent_usage.story_architect: Combined four sample engines into one canon: failure record, limited expedition, observer advice, and bonded constraint.
agent_usage.episode_writer: Drafted episode TXT files from scene contracts and active information channels.
agent_usage.narrative_engagement_editor: Set each episode ending to an unresolved next reason.
agent_usage.progression_foreshadowing_editor: Mapped proof beats, costs, and reminders across episodes 1-10.
agent_usage.continuity_editor: Tracked facts, debt, inventory, observer rules, and unresolved threats.
agent_usage.serial_ops_analyst: Packaged the 10 files as the first source chunk/buffer unit.
agent_usage.incident_diagnoser: Recorded source limitation and validation path.
agent_usage.rights_reviewer: Used only derived sample functions; no sample names, phrases, or copy-overlap scoring.

canon.core_ability: 잔류기록: 실패한 회수에서 마지막 10분의 감각과 선택 결과를 보존한다.
canon.main_constraint: 피 대신 체온과 기억을 담보로 삼는 회수 계약. 쓰면 쓸수록 도윤의 하루가 짧아진다.
canon.observer_channel: 관측 회랑: 익명의 고위 관측자들이 조언하지만, 누구도 도윤의 몸값을 대신 치르지 않는다.
canon.expedition_rule: 폐쇄구역 문은 10분만 열린다. 가져온 물건은 거점 개선이나 다음 병목으로 변환된다.
